title: Prompt an item to ask additional questions
excerpt:

posts.author: ltabellini (Laura)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need to connect 2 boards. However board 2 needs more information from our customers that is not on board 1.
Once the 2 boards are connected, is there a way to prompt board 2 to ask additional questions? Maybe by activating a form?
